description: A complete, hands-on path to mastering machine learning with KaizenStat — from intuition to production-grade pipelines.

chapters.title: What is Machine Learning?
chapters.description: The mental model: learning from data, the three paradigms, and where KaizenStat fits.

chapters.title: Your First Model in 3 Lines
chapters.description: Install KaizenStat and train a real, production-ready model before you learn the theory.

chapters.title: Data Quality & Leakage
chapters.description: Why 80% of ML is data. Health scores, leakage detection, and the trap of fake accuracy.

chapters.title: Preprocessing & Feature Engineering
chapters.description: Scaling, encoding, missing values, splitting — and letting KaizenStat fix() do the heavy lifting.

chapters.title: Linear Regression
chapters.description: Predicting numbers. Gradient descent, the loss surface, and reading the residuals.

chapters.title: Logistic Regression
chapters.description: The workhorse of classification — sigmoid, decision boundaries, and probabilities.

chapters.title: Decision Trees
chapters.description: White-box models that split the world with yes/no questions.

chapters.title: Ensembles: Forests & Boosting
chapters.description: Random Forests, Gradient Boosting, XGBoost, LightGBM — and why ensembles win.

chapters.title: Unsupervised Learning
chapters.description: K-Means, finding hidden structure, and choosing k without labels.

chapters.title: Model Evaluation Done Right
chapters.description: Beyond accuracy: precision, recall, F1, ROC-AUC, and the confusion matrix.

chapters.title: Overfitting & the Bias-Variance Tradeoff
chapters.description: The central tension of ML, cross-validation, and how to detect overfitting automatically.

chapters.title: Hyperparameter Tuning & AutoML
chapters.description: GridSearch, RandomSearch, progressive tuning, and KaizenStat's stacking AutoML engine.

chapters.title: Debugging a Failing Model
chapters.description: Root-cause analysis: failure slices, data-vs-model blame, and what to fix next.

chapters.title: Trust, Calibration & Production-Readiness
chapters.description: Is your model safe to ship? Calibration, drift, and the 0–100 Trust Score.

chapters.title: Text & NLP (Bonus)
chapters.description: The exact same pipeline on text data — TF-IDF, embeddings, and self-healing.

chapters.title: Capstone: Customer Churn End-to-End
chapters.description: Ship a real model from raw CSV to deployable .joblib — the full KaizenStat workflow.
